subject: A vampire cleric in elaborate dark gold-trimmed ecclesiastical regalia, holding a curved ritual blade aloft mid-ceremony
description: A robed vampire cleric stands in a dramatic, theatrical pose, raising a curved sacrificial dagger high in one hand. The figure wears ornate dark vestments trimmed in gold, with a high collar and heavy ceremonial garments suggesting a high priest or pontiff of a death-cult. The skin is pale and the features are gaunt, eyes shadowed; the mouth is parted in a stern, almost ecstatic expression of authority. The background is a swirl of dark golds, blacks, and warm browns suggesting a cathedral or ritual chamber lit by fire or torchlight. The composition centers tightly on the upper body, foregrounding the lifted blade and the figure's commanding gesture.
foreground: vampire cleric in ornate dark gold-trimmed robes raising a curved ritual dagger
background: blurred dark cathedral or ritual chamber in golds and shadow, suggesting torch or fire light
emotion: stern authority, ecstatic cruelty, ceremonial command
